_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
- **1997** — IMO adopts Resolution 8 addressing CO₂ emissions from ships; first regulatory acknowledgement of shipping GHG (in force as of 1997).
- **2011** — EEDI (Energy Efficiency Design Index) and SEEMP first adopted as mandatory GHG measures (in force as of 2013).
- **1 November 2022** — Amendments to MARPOL Annex VI (EEXI, CII, SEEMP) enter into force (in force as of 1 November 2022). *Source: IMO EEXI/CII Entry into Force press briefing, IMO, 2022.*
- **1 January 2023** — EEXI certification and CII rating/reporting requirements become mandatory for all applicable ships (in force as of 1 January 2023). *Source: IMO MEPC FAQ on EEXI and CII, IMO. https://www.imo.org/en/mediacentre/hottopics/pages/eexi-cii-faq.aspx.*
- **2023** — First CII annual reporting cycle completed (covering 2023 data); initial CII ratings issued in 2024.
- **3–7 July 2023 (MEPC 80)** — 2023 IMO GHG Strategy (Resolution MEPC.377(80)) adopted; LCA Guidelines (Resolution MEPC.376(80)) adopted; IMO Net-Zero Framework work programme launched (in force as of 7 July 2023). *Source: 2023 IMO Strategy on Reduction of GHG Emissions from Ships, IMO MEPC 80. https://www.imo.org/en/ourwork/environment/pages/2023-imo-strategy-on-reduction-of-ghg-emissions-from-ships.aspx.*
- **2024 (MEPC 82)** — Comprehensive impact assessment of candidate mid-term measures completed and reported.
- **7–11 April 2025 (MEPC 83)** — IMO Net-Zero Framework draft regulations approved (draft MARPOL Annex VI amendments); includes mandatory GFI fuel standard and global GHG emissions pricing mechanism; draft circulated to Member States for adoption. *Source: IMO MEPC 83 Session Summary, IMO, April 2025. https://www.imo.org/en/mediacentre/meetingsummaries/pages/mepc-83rd-session.aspx.*
- **October 2025 (Extraordinary MEPC)** — Formal adoption of IMO Net-Zero Framework (MARPOL Annex VI amendments) targeted. *Source: IUMI MEPC 83 Update, June 2025. https://iumi.com/newsletter-june-2025/mepc-83-update/.*
- **1 January 2026** — Enhanced DCS reporting granularity (including transport work data) mandatory; revised SEEMP Part II must be on board all existing ships; Phase 2 review of CII/SEEMP/EEXI commences. *Source: IMO EEXI/CII FAQ, IMO. https://www.imo.org/en/mediacentre/hottopics/pages/eexi-cii-faq.aspx.*
- **31 December 2025** — SEEMP Part III (CII implementation plan) must be updated to reflect 2027–2030 CII Z-factors.
- **Spring 2026 (MEPC 84)** — Correspondence Group reports on non-CO₂ GHG measurement and verification framework; further refinement of Net-Zero Framework guidelines. *Source: DNV MEPC 83 summary, DNV, April 2025. https://www.dnv.com/news/2025/imo-mepc-83-ghg-requirements-approved-taking-effect-from-2028/.*
- **March 2027** — IMO Net-Zero Framework (GFI standard + emissions pricing) enters into force (conditional on October 2025 adoption). *Source: IMO approves net-zero regulations press briefing, IMO, April 2025. https://www.imo.org/en/mediacentre/pressbriefings/pages/imo-approves-netzero-regulations.aspx.*
- **2027** — Year of preparation under Net-Zero Framework; no penalties for non-compliance; zero/near-zero fuel availability to be assured by operators.
- **2028** — GFI reporting obligations begin; emissions pricing mechanism applies; initial price USD 100/tonne CO₂. *Source: European Commission press release, April 2025. https://transport.ec.europa.eu/news-events/news/landmark-agreement-towards-achieving-net-zero-emissions-global-shipping-2050-2025-04-11_en.*
- **Mid-2029** — First Reward Unit payments anticipated for vessels using zero/near-zero fuels and technologies.
- **2030** — Indicative checkpoint: at least 20% (striving 30%) absolute GHG reduction vs. 2008; at least 40% carbon intensity reduction vs. 2008; at least 5% (striving 10%) of energy from zero/near-zero sources.
- **Spring 2027–Spring 2028 (Phase 2 CII review)** — Phase 2 review of short-term measures (CII/SEEMP/EEXI) concludes; further amendments possible.
- **2040** — Indicative checkpoint: at least 70% (striving 80%) absolute GHG reduction vs. 2008.
- **Autumn 2028 (MEPC 88)** — Finalization of review of 2023 IMO GHG Strategy; adoption of 2028 IMO Strategy on reduction of GHG emissions from ships targeted. *Source: IMO cutting GHG emissions hot topic page, IMO. https://www.imo.org/en/mediacentre/hottopics/pages/cutting-ghg-emissions.aspx.*
- **By or around 2050** — Net-zero GHG emissions from international shipping target.
